field.label: Enable TUN
field.help: Master switch for transparent proxy. Disabling will stop Mihomo from intercepting traffic.

field.label: Device Name
field.help: TUN interface name. Must match the firewall interface created by install.sh.

field.label: Auto Route
field.help: Automatically configure routes pointing to the TUN device.

field.label: Auto Detect Interface
field.help: Auto detect the outbound interface for direct connections.

field.label: DNS Hijack
field.help: Comma-separated list of DNS hijack rules. Default: any:53,tcp://any:53.
